description: Use this API to add or modify all branch flow data records in a specified subsystem of the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_brflw_subsys(sid, all, autoadd, bflwid, intgar, realar, useval)
python_syntax: ierr = opf_brflw_subsys(sid, all, autoadd, bflwid, intgar, realar, useval)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem id from 0 to 11. a subsystem must have been previously defined. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: autoadd
parameters.description: Indicates whether new records can be added, or are to be modified. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: bflwid
parameters.description: Branch flow identifier. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: useval
parameters.description: An array of five elements specifying Specifies whether the corresponding REALAR value should be applied as provided, or multiplied by the present value or added to the present value. (input).

autoadd.description: do not add a new branch flow record if it does not already exist.
add a new branch flow record if it does not already exist.
only modify existing branch flow records that correspond to the flow identifier given in BFLWID.

intgar.description: branch flow type (default value of 4 for new records, current value otherwise).
limit type imposed on the branch flow limits (default value of 1 for new records, current value otherwise).
use the limits that have been defined.

realar.description: maximum normal flow limit in physical units (default value of 0.0 for new records, current value otherwise).
minimum normal flow limit in physical units (default value of 0.0 for new records, current value otherwise).
maximum emergency flow limit in physical units (default value of 0.0 for new records, current value otherwise).
minimum emergency flow limit in physical units (default value of 0.0 for new records, current value otherwise).
soft limit penalty weight (default value of 1.0 for new records, current value otherwise).

useval.description: indicates how the value of REALAR(1) should be used.
if the value of REALAR(1) is to be used as defined.
if the value of REALAR(1) is to be multiplied by the present value of the maximum normal flow limit.
if the value of REALAR(1) is to be added to the present value of the maximum normal flow limit.
indicates how the value of REALAR(2) should be used.
if the value of REALAR(2) is to be used as defined.
if the value of REALAR(2) is to be multiplied by the present value of the minimum normal flow limit.
if the value of REALAR(2) is to be added to the present value of the minimum normal flow limit.
indicates how the value of REALAR(3) should be used.
if the value of REALAR(3) is to be used as defined.
if the value of REALAR(3) is to be multiplied by the present value of the maximum emergency flow limit.
if the value of REALAR(3) is to be added to the present value of the maximum emergency flow limit.
indicates how the value of REALAR(4) should be used.
if the value of REALAR(4) is to be used as defined.
if the value of REALAR(4) is to be multiplied by the present value of the minimum emergency flow limit.
if the value of REALAR(4) is to be added to the present value of the minimum emergency flow limit.
indicates how the value of REALAR(5) should be used.
if the value of REALAR(5) is to be used as defined.
if the value of REALAR(5) is to be multiplied by the present value of the soft limit penalty weight.
if the value of REALAR(5) is to be added to the present value of the soft limit penalty weight.

error_codes.description: non-fatal error occurred. Possible warning messages are: - Invalid flow type specified. - Invalid branch flow limit type specified. - Maximum normal flow limit is less than the minimum normal flow limit. - Maximum emergency flow limit is less than the minimum emergency flow limit.
invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
branch flow constraint table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
